train.prompt: I want to create a new skill for handling database migrations, can you help me build it from scratch?
Run eval test cases against my tdd-workflow skill and show me the results in a viewer
The api-design skill keeps producing wrong output formatting, I need to improve it based on the test failures
Optimize the description of my python-patterns skill so it triggers more reliably when users ask about Python best practices
Benchmark my skill with 3 runs per configuration and show me the variance analysis with mean and stddev
I made a new SKILL.md for docker deployment, can you validate it and package it as a .skill file?
My skill doesn't trigger when users ask about it in casual language, help me fix the description field
I want to do a blind A/B comparison between the old and new versions of my code-review skill
Write unit tests for this Python function that calculates fibonacci numbers
Help me debug this segfault in my C++ program
Deploy this Express.js app to AWS using Docker Compose
Review this pull request for security vulnerabilities

val.prompt: I've been iterating on this skill for PDF processing but the outputs keep regressing, help me set up a proper eval pipeline with before/after comparison
Create a skill that helps users write better git commit messages, then test it with realistic prompts
Run the trigger accuracy optimizer on my search-first skill for 5 iterations with train/test split
Set up PostgreSQL connection pooling with PgBouncer
Refactor this React component to use hooks instead of class components
